provenance.trigger_reason: M19: implement a repo-local capability documentation generator for tusq.dev. Add a tusq docs command that reads tusq.manifest.json and emits Markdown review/adoption documentation for capabilities, including approval state, side_effect_class, sensitivity_class, auth_hints, provenance, examples, constraints, redaction, and manifest version metadata. Keep it local/offline and do not add live execution semantics.
